description: E3 countries will help us with anti-ballistics. By the way, I hope that we will be able to develop a European anti-ballistic system together with Great Britain. We are working on it. We need it, and the UK needs it. Second: sanctions. Yesterday at the E3 meeting, everyone agreed that we need to tighten sanctions against Russia. Third: we need to transfer the Ukrainian army to the contract system. Be...

description_uk: Країни E3 допоможуть нам з антибалістикою. До речі, сподіваюся, що нам вдасться розробити європейську антибалістичну систему разом із Великою Британією. Ми над цим працюємо. Це потрібно нам, і це потрібно Великій Британії. Друге: санкції. Учора на зустрічі E3 всі погодилися, що нам треба посилити санкції проти Росії. Третє: нам треба перевести українську армію на контрактну систему. Бути...

title: Kherson: 👀 There are problems with the land corridor to Crimea: the Armed...
title_en: Kherson: 👀 There are problems with the land corridor to Crimea: the Armed...
title_uk: Херсон: 👀 З сухопутним коридором до Криму проблеми: Збройні...
description: 👀 There are problems with the land corridor to Crimea: the Armed Forces of Ukraine again struck the Chongar bridge. The movement is stopped, - the balance Chongarsky bridge is one of the key routes connecting the occupied Crimea with the captured part of the Kherson region. Military cargo, equipment and supplies of the Russian group in the south of Ukraine pass through it.
description_en: 👀 There are problems with the land corridor to Crimea: the Armed Forces of Ukraine again struck the Chongar bridge. The movement is stopped, - the balance Chongarsky bridge is one of the key routes connecting the occupied Crimea with the captured part of the Kherson region. Military cargo, equipment and supplies of the Russian group in the south of Ukraine pass through it.
description_uk: 👀 С сухопутным коридором в Крым проблемки: ВСУ снова нанесли удар по Чонгарскому мосту. Движение остановлено, - сальдо Чонгарский мост - один из ключевых маршрутов, связывающих оккупированный Крым с захваченной частью Херсонской области. Через него проходят военные грузы, техника и снабжение российской группировки на юге Украины.

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Security Council officials condemn attacks on civilians at emergency UN session. The United Nations Security Council convened on June 8 to discuss Russia's recent large-scale attacks on Ukraine, as U.N. officials warned that civilian casualties and destruction have reached some of the highest levels seen in the war in recent months.

title: Sumy: Casualties reported
description: Man on bicycle killed in combined Russian attack on Sumy Oblast Russian forces carried out a combined attack on the Seredyna-Buda hromada in Sumy Oblast on 8 June, killing a 71-year-old man who was riding a bicycle. A hromada is an administrative unit designating a village, several villages, or a town, and their adjacent territories – ed. Read the full article on our website

title: Kharkiv: Air defense active
description: Ukrainian drones are already autonomously shooting down Shaheds 👥 The protection of the Ukrainian sky is getting a qualitatively new tool. This was announced by the Minister of Defense of Ukraine Mykhailo Fedorov. One of the members of Brave1 developed a system that takes over 95% of the entire process of intercepting enemy drones. All a person has to do is select a target and press the command. The technology has already proven its effectiveness in real combat...
description_en: Ukrainian drones are already autonomously shooting down Shaheds 👥 The protection of the Ukrainian sky is getting a qualitatively new tool. This was announced by the Minister of Defense of Ukraine Mykhailo Fedorov. One of the members of Brave1 developed a system that takes over 95% of the entire process of intercepting enemy drones. All a person has to do is select a target and press the command. The technology has already proven its effectiveness in real combat...
description_uk: Українські дрони вже автономно збивають Shahedи 👥 Захист українського неба отримує якісно новий інструмент. Про це повідомив Міністр Оборони України Михайло Федоров. Один із учасників Brave1 розробив систему, яка бере на себе 95% усього процесу перехоплення ворожих дронів. Людині залишається лише вибрати ціль і натиснути команду. Технологія вже підтвердила свою ефективність у реальних бойових...

title: Explosions reported
description: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine strongly condemns another attack by the Russian Federation on the object of the nuclear infrastructure of Ukraine - the Centralized Storage of Spent Nuclear Fuel. On June 7, 2026, at 02:10 a.m., a Russian drone attacked the container reception building of the Centralized Spent Nuclear Fuel Storage Facility. As a result of the explosion, the building was partially destroyed...

As a result of the explosion, the building was partially destroyed...

Внаслідок вибуху частково зруйновано будівлю...

Об’єкт надзвичайно критичної інфраструктури. І надзвичайно підлий російський удар.
